item.title: Imgur made me a custom avatar so I etch a sketched it
item.description: It's hard to properly express gratitude while trying to etch something in under a minute so hopefully I'll be a little more eloquent here: It's been a pleasure and an honor to share my love for this nifty toy with you - my fellow Imgurians - for these past 11 years. Thanks as always for your overwhelming support! I hope you enjoyed my frenetic gratitude in video form.
item.dc:creator: pikajane

46

49 1/3
50 2/3
51 3/3
52
53 This is the sort of thinking we're up against in the class war: 'Gurner Group founder Tim Gurner tells the Financial Review Property Summit workers have become "arrogant" since COVID and "We've got to kill that attitude."'
54 'Gurner Group founder Tim Gurner tells the Financial Review Property Summit workers have become "arrogant" since COVID and "We've got to kill that attitude."' from https://twitter.com/FinancialReview/status/1701440109948887057
55
56
57
58 Start with your friends, co-workers and neighbours. United grassroots action gets results.

item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
got my meme sorting caught up. have plenty more to dump. enjoy!
yea so glad I am not like that.
got a few of these.
liars and cheaters will always be just that. fuck em.
om. om. my birthday is coming up as you well know :p
replace annoy with other words.
hehehe. yea. I like my coffee.
yea I keep coming back. memes. yay.
I thought i just posted this. why is my memory so bad. le sigh.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 "Life is made up of desires that seem big and vital one minute, and little and absurd the next. I guess we get what's best for us in the end." - Alice Caldwell Rice I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur

not nicotine anymore.. greetings online friends
wtf i didn't even do anything
mmm hmm
not all guys can pull off the bald look tho
maybe get some free grooming here and here
having all the accoutrements is kinda important too
i guess
gross
radcliffe has done some funny/interesting work recently
as is tradition
great song
this is about as political of a meme that i will post. sorry
seems like a believable character arc
gif of the guy about to say something then stops
abacus salesman?
i knew it
that's deep
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Dumps of Unusual Size 18: Movies, TV, Books, & Games, Part 3
item.description:
Honestly, my first experience with Tim Curry was "Fern Gully"
I reject your POIT, and substitute it with my ZORT!
I still haven't forgiven the original "Jurassic PArk" for not showing the T rex swimming in the canal like in the book.
Almost 41 years ago now.
Surely there is an Evil Overlord Rule that applies to this...
The Agent
So my parents were moving and they had a little cherub sitting with its head in its hands that they weren't going to keep. Early every Monday, I was driving out of town once a week for a few months, and one morning I put it in the front planter of a friend who lived on my way. Then every following Monday I would swing by and move the statue a little closer to their front door. Eventually it was on their porch right in front of the steps. He never knew it was me, and told a mutual friend the story of the freaky little statue that had appeared in his yard and kept moving.
item.dc:creator: Schadwen

item.title: 'Culture isn't free snacks. It's how Monday feels.'
item.description: Mv edit - I'm not an employee, but I do know what it means to be underpaid and be an entry-level employee with years of experience. Yes, I'm a writer. You are some of my stories, they're free through Saturday. https://inkican.com/smashwords-spring-scifi-free-short-stories/

item.title: Eutelsat about to replace Starlink in Ukraine. The company’s CEO, Eva Berneke, confirmed that Eutelsat is considering deploying 40,000 terminals, equivalent to the number currently used by Ukraine.

item.title: one more video dump of things I like, so that I can find them back easily
item.description:
Japanese Bullet Train ... Their faces !
2 :: Mirrors are just decorative
Professional foosball player.
4 :: Robot dog vs Drone :: the future of war ?
Skating the streets into Medellín, Colombia. I may like Colombia more and more ...
6 :: a real masterpiece
Trucks should be more careful when they are in cities
8 :: Woman shows off amazing soccer handling skills
This girl's football handling skills
10 :: Grandmas got game I think I'm gonna buy some bottles
Goose Parade in Valkenburg, Netherlands
12 :: All that squirrel's hard work wasted.
Seagull swallowing a whole damn squirrel
14 :: The city of Utrecht in the Netherlands is known for having one of the most advanced bicycle infrastructures in the world.
The entire stand cheering for her ! We love it.
16 :: The Precision And Skill Of This Stone Mason
This artist can create paintings using only their bare hands.
18 :: Bro won ... but at what cost ...
If you can park an 18-wheeler like this, you deserve some type of award.
20 :: throwing the phone
Sarah Lezito, aka the world's greatest stuntwoman, showing how to ride a motorcycle.
22 :: Quick ... to the bat cave!

item.title: Newspeople said what
item.dc:creator: ILBaztardo

item.title: Some heroes wear cleats
item.description: Back story: The woman on the right is Lia Thomas. She tied Riley Gaines for 5th place in a NCAA 200 yard freestyle swimming meet. Since then Riley has made barrels of money doing performative transphobia for willing, bigoted audiences because of losing literally nothing to what she describes as a "biological male". The big tragedy is that she tied for 5th. She didn't even lose fifth place, she tied for it. In other words, if Lia wasn't even there, LITERALLY NOTHING would be different. She would have scored fifth place, graduated and then moved onto a life of average obscurity after getting her degree in health sciences. She planned to "become a dentist". Whether that was true, she has found it much more lucrative to profit off dogpiling onto an tiny minority.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: Imagine if your dog dug up gold coins, so you got a metal detector, and you and your dog discovered $10m.
item.description: The article mentions a coin dealer who said he dealt with much bigger treasures which had been found. Like what?! He made it sound like the others were difficult, though. Difficulty rules out most people! :D https://time.com/13071/saddle-ridge-hoard-gold-coins/
item.dc:creator: MenloPart

item.title: What Happened Today - #34
item.description: The type IS smaller. And we still had to cut some news. We're at a crossroads on what it means to be America and American. Don't forget today's science rallies in 32 cities. Spread the word. #resist #GovBriefToday Your links: 1 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/trump-administration-must-pay-debts-usaid-partners-monday-judge-rules-rcna195248 2 - https://www.reuters.com/business/tariff-reprieve-likely-be-extended-all-usmca-compliant-goods-lutnick-says-2025-03-06/ 3 - https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/5179829-judge-blocks-trump-omb-freeze/ 4 - https://www.frommers.com/trip-ideas/national-park/full-list-of-34-national-park-leases-cancelled-parks-being-dismantled-before-our-eyes/ 5 - https://thehill.com/policy/technology/5180939-trump-considers-extending-tiktok-ban/ 6 - https://www.hrdive.com/news/federal-judge-reinstates-fired-nlrb-member-gwynne-wilcox/741848/ 7 - https://apnews.com/article/house-censure-green-trump-joint-address-61d82026983c99a269209bbeb32b45a5 8 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/doge-targets-child-support-database-full-of-income-data/ar-AA1AotGu 9 - https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/toronto/ontario-electricity-surcharge-us-tariffs-ford-1.7476515 10 - https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/06/trump-republicans-amy-coney-barrett-dei-supreme-court/81843688007/ 11 - https://www.axios.com/2025/03/06/trump-perkins-coie-security-clearances 12 - https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/06/gavin-newsom-trans-people-sports 13 - https://newrepublic.com/post/192442/doge-marocco-sued-us-marshals-takeover-usadf-agency 14 - https://edition.cnn.com/2025/03/05/business/musk-usps-amtrak-privatization/index.html 15 - https://www.nbcwashington.com/news/local/trump-says-dc-must-clear-unsightly-homeless-encampments/3860501/ 16 - https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/06/treasury-secretary-bessent-says-the-american-dream-is-not-about-access-to-cheap-goods.html 15 - https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5181461-trump-msnbc-nicolle-wallace-rachel-maddow/ FIGHTING BACK - https://standupforscience2025.org/ Archive - https://govbrief.today

item.title: Stand Up for Science this Friday!
item.description: Find your local event here: https://standupforscience2025.org/local-event-information/ The 2025 Trump administration has launched an unprecedented attack on science, undermining research, public health, and environmental protections. Thousands of scientists have been fired from federal agencies, crippling critical research at institutions like the National Institutes of Health (NIH) and the National Science Foundation (NSF). At the same time, deep budget cuts to scientific programs have halted advancements in medicine, climate research, and technological innovation. Without adequate funding and staffing, our ability to address pressing global challenges is in serious jeopardy. Beyond defunding and layoffs, the administration has aggressively censored scientific information, removing climate change, health, and diversity-related data from government websites. Simultaneously, unqualified political appointees have been placed in charge of key scientific institutions, replacing experts with figures who prioritize ideology over evidence. Meanwhile, environmental protections have been stripped away, worsening pollution and endangering wildlife, as corporate interests take precedence over public health. These actions threaten the integrity of scientific research and the well-being of future generations. This is why we must take a stand. On Friday, March 7th, scientists, educators, and concerned citizens will unite for the Stand Up for Science protests across the country. We cannot allow science to be silenced, defunded, or manipulated for political gain. Join us in demanding accountability, protecting evidence-based policy, and ensuring that science continues to serve the public good. Our future depends on it. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/03/endangered-species-trump-federal-worker-firings https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/feb/20/nih-trump-executive-orders https://www.theatlantic.com/health/archive/2025/02/trump-science-data-gender-dei/681698 https://time.com/7264361/jay-bhattacharya-nih-trump-pick/ https://www.politico.com/news/2025/02/21/trump-gutted-climate-policy-across-federal-government-00204998
item.dc:creator: elusivekarma
